description_long: This is a circular metal manhole cover set flush within a square section of dark asphalt pavement. The cover features a decorative radial pattern with concentric circles and petal-like motifs radiating from the center, giving it a distinct urban utility appearance. Around the perimeter of the cover, there is a ring of accumulated dirt, debris, and some patches of green grass or weeds, indicating it is outdoors and exposed to the elements. The surface of the manhole cover is slightly worn, with visible texturing and minor discoloration from use and weathering. The surrounding pavement is rough and speckled, typical of city streets or sidewalks. No visible bolts, fasteners, or inscriptions are apparent on the cover, and there is no manufacturer logo present.
description: A round, patterned metal manhole cover set in a square patch of asphalt, surrounded by dirt and grass. The cover features a decorative radial motif and shows signs of outdoor wear.
description_view_0: The manhole cover is seen with a clear view of the decorative radial pattern and a prominent ring of grass and debris on the upper side.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the lower right section, where the grass and debris are more concentrated, and the pattern on the cover remains visible.
description_view_2: The view shows the manhole cover with the grass and debris mostly on the left side, and the radial pattern is still discernible.
description_view_3: From this perspective, the cover's pattern is visible with the debris and grass forming a partial ring on the right side.
attribute_pattern_design: Decorative radial pattern with concentric circles and petal-like motifs; textured surface.
